channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: The Death of an AI Whistleblower
item.description:
Jacob Silverman
Suchir Balaji sought to expose OpenAI’s data abuses. Did it come at the expense of his own life?
The post The Death of an AI Whistleblower appeared first on The Nation. [OpenAI]

item.title: India's Data Centre capacity to reach 5 GW by 2030; Market size $22 billion: Vestian
item.description: With over 700 megawatts (MW) currently under construction and another 1.2 GW in the planning stages, the report expects the sector to add 2-3 GW over the next five to seven years

item.title: Humyn Labs expands data collection for physical AI with $20 mn push
item.description: The firm focuses on recording first-person human activity, visuals, and movements. This data collection occurs within commercial, agricultural, and residential environments. The datasets capture how humans physically interact with surroundings to train physic…

item.title: World Bank chief sounds alarm about looming jobs crisis even after war ends
item.description: The Middle East ​war will dominate global finance officials’ talks this week in Washington, but World Bank President Ajay Banga is sounding the alarm about a bigger, ‌looming crisis: a huge gap in jobs for the 1.2 billion people who will reach working ​age in…

item.title: From Infinite Scroll to Command and Control: What Big Tech’s Courtroom Reckoning Means for Military AI Governance
item.description: [Alexander Blanchard is Senior Researcher in the Governance of AI Programme at the Stockholm International Peace Research Institute (SIPRI), Sweden] In recent weeks, there has been a good deal of commentary about military applications of artificial intelligen… [Intel]

item.title: Apple Mac Mini, Mac Studio Sellout: AI Boom, DRAM Shortage, and M5 Upgrade Rumors Collide
item.description: Apple's high-RAM Mac mini and Mac Studio vanish amid soaring AI demand, a global DRAM shortage, and growing speculation of an M5 refresh. [Apple]

item.title: UK impact VC Eka Ventures closes second fund at $107M
item.description: When Eka Ventures held the final close of its first fund at £68 million in 2021, the London-based firm staked a claim that few UK VCs were willing to make at the time: that impact investing and venture-scale returns were not a trade-off but a thesis. Five yea…
